**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Tianqing Aerospace Technology Co., Ltd. is a highly deceptive case of 'cross-dimensional mislabeling.' The official commercial system, simply because its name contains 'Aerospace,' extremely hastily categorized it into 'Railway, Ship, Aerospace and Other Transport Equipment Manufacturing,' and bizarrely sub-classified it as 'Urban Rail Transit Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the forensic probe directly grabbed its core feature parameters: this is a small enterprise located on the '1st Floor, Tower A, Kechuang No. 2 Building, Nanjing Area of Jiangsu Free Trade Zone,' with an insured headcount of 38 people. Its official website is 'njtianqing.com.cn.' Reviewing the permitted items on its business license: 'civil aircraft parts manufacturing; aerospace equipment manufacturing.' Looking further at the general items: 'intelligent unmanned aerial vehicle manufacturing,' 'satellite communication/remote sensing services,' 'motor manufacturing,' 'navigation and mapping instrument manufacturing.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: the official so-called 'Urban Rail Transit Equipment (Subway/High-speed Rail) Manufacturing' is pure nonsense. This is a genuine 'UAV (Unmanned Aerial Vehicle) and aerospace parts R&D and manufacturing enterprise.' Combined with its 38-person scale and the physical space on the first floor of a tech innovation building, it likely possesses the capacity for small-batch UAV final assembly or the production of core aerospace motors/instrumentation, making it a typical new aerospace technology entity.
